name: Tvarohove Sisky
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. On a floured surface, roll the dough into cigar-shaped pieces, each about 4-inches long.
3. Drop half of the dumplings into boiling water at a time.
4. Cook for 15 minutes, then carefully remove with a slotted spoon and drain well.
5. Serve sprinkled with sugar, cinnamon, and melted butter.
Makes 18 dumplings.
Note: Name is pronounced Sheeshky. My notes: This is a wonderful-tasting dish. Source: 1989 Texas Folklife Fest From: Cindy Tarsi
